ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent and its purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agent's details */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the agent operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the action entails */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was defined */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the action's details */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action that led to this reward */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that received the reward */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reward was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reward's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_estimates" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value estimate */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent making the estimate */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action associated with the estimate */,
  "value" REAL /* Estimated value of taking the specified action */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the value estimate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the value estimate was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the value estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_estimates_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_estimates_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_actions" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action log entry */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent performing the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the action was taken */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode in which the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_actions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, developer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view model, update data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
